chk_facilities__location_bounds.name: chk_facilities__location_bounds
chk_facilities__location_bounds.value: ST_X("facilities"."location") between -180 and 180 and ST_Y("facilities"."location") between -90 and 90

chk_sms_provider_configurations__scope_s.name: chk_sms_provider_configurations__scope_shape
chk_sms_provider_configurations__scope_s.value: ("sms_provider_configurations"."scope_type" = 'platform' and "sms_provider_configurations"."scope_id" is null) or ("sms_provider_configurations"."scope_type" = 'city' and "sms_provider_configurations"."scope_id" is not null)

chk_staff_assignments__revocation_consis.name: chk_staff_assignments__revocation_consistency
chk_staff_assignments__revocation_consis.value: ("staff_assignments"."assignment_status" = 'active' and "staff_assignments"."revoked_at" is null and "staff_assignments"."revoked_by_user_id" is null) or ("staff_assignments"."assignment_status" = 'revoked' and "staff_assignments"."revoked_at" is not null and "staff_assignments"."revoked_by_user_id" is not null)

chk_users__identity_channel_present.name: chk_users__identity_channel_present
chk_users__identity_channel_present.value: "users"."phone_number" is not null or "users"."email" is not null

chk_users__email_normalized.name: chk_users__email_normalized
chk_users__email_normalized.value: "users"."email" is null or ("users"."email" = lower(btrim("users"."email")) and char_length("users"."email") between 3 and 254 and position('@' in "users"."email") > 1)

chk_users__phone_verification_has_phone_.name: chk_users__phone_verification_has_phone_number
chk_users__phone_verification_has_phone_.value: "users"."phone_number_verified_at" is null or "users"."phone_number" is not null

chk_users__email_verification_has_email.name: chk_users__email_verification_has_email
chk_users__email_verification_has_email.value: "users"."email_verified_at" is null or "users"."email" is not null
